name: Oyster Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the oysters in their liquor until the edges just begin to curl.
2. Add milk and butter to the pot.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Heat slowly, ensuring not to boil the mixture.
5. Serve immediately for best flavor.
6. (Optional) For an extra "zip", sprinkle seafood seasoning on each serving.
